title: Redemption
preview: Redemption Redemption (36 instances) 10:7 - Experience and Perception You will not find peace until you have removed the nails from the hands of God’s Son and taken the last thorn from his forehead. The love of God surrounds His Son, whom the god of the crucifixion condemns. Teach not that I died in vain. Teach rather that I did not die by demonstrating that I live in you. For the undoing of the crucifixion of God’s Son is the work of the redemption, in which everyone has a part of equal value.
